emails.subject: ISO Audit
emails.body: ISO Audit Chris, I submitted a WIP last week for 3 other pieces of information for each of our 5 audit days. of estimated accounts of estimated intervals Detailed account file, SQMD file and MDEF file CSC is preparing a quote to provide this information, which will be forwarded to me Friday. Please advise what needs to be done to obtain approval for this quote. Thanks, Ken

emails.subject: RE: ISO Audit
emails.body: RE: ISO Audit Send it to myself and Murray, and we will get it approved,

emails.subject: ISO Audit
emails.body: ISO Audit Chris, What is the latest... Thanks, Ken

emails.subject: RE: ISO Audit
emails.body: RE: ISO Audit Ken, First of all, sorry for the mix up last week that is all on me. As far as the comment on the SQMD, Murray wants to take a look at the responses which should happen this morning or early afternoon. I would also like to schedule some time this week to sit down and talk about some questions that I have about the audit that fall outside of my responses. Once again I apologize for the delay and I will have something to you ASAP. Chris To: Stokley, Chris

emails.subject: FW: ISO Audit
emails.body: FW: ISO Audit Ken, Murray is going to take a look at the responses before his 10:30 meeting at which time I will forward those over to you. Also, I am going to have Patti set up a time for you and I to meet on Thursday. Chris To: Lewchuk, Ken
